title: Saudi Arabian Chicken Shawarma
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian street food dish featuring juicy chicken and crispy flatbread.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the chicken breast, mouthwatering spice blend, salt, and pepper. Mix well to coat.
2. Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
5. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
6. Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 5 minutes.
7. Assemble the shawarma by slicing the grilled chicken and serving it in the warm flatbread with a dollop of Arabian flatbread sauce, a sprinkle of chopped parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
